catalog_content:
Item Name: Kauffman Orchards Blueberry Jam, All Natural, No Preservatives, 18 Oz. (Pack of 2) Bullet Point 1: Made in the USA; Delicious, homestyle Blueberry Jam is wonderful on toast, bagels, and crumpets Bullet Point 2: Homemade in Ohio's Amish country with quality fruit ingredients Bullet Point 3: A vintage jam with bold blueberry flavor from plump, succulent blueberries Bullet Point 4: Customers in our Bird-in-Hand market often comment on the real fruit flavor in this line of homestyle jams and jellies Bullet Point 5: Low added sugar; No artificial colors or preservatives; No HFCS Product Description: An authentic, homemade, less commercial jam brought to you by Kauffman Orchards. We suggest topping your favorite scoop of ice cream with a generous quantity of this fabulous Blueberry Jam. You'll love this vintage jam with its bold blueberry flavor from plump, succulent blueberries. Get right to the good stuff with this wholesome, economical blueberry jam.

Are you looking for an explanation of the differences between jams, jellies, and spreads? Jams include pieces of the real fruit within the puree; jellies do not. Spreads are a no-granulated-sugar-added version and are popular with folks who have diabetes and need to closely watch their sugar intake. Value: 36.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Artisanal, homemade-style blueberry jam marketed as natural and preservative-free, positioning it as a premium alternative to commercial jams. The 18 oz. glass jar packaging and Amish craftsmanship suggest a mid-tier price point, appealing to health-conscious consumers seeking authentic fruit flavor. The pack-of-2 format enhances perceived value, though the absence of organic or specialty certifications may limit its premium positioning.
